subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God who art near unto Him! I hope that, through the bounties of the Lord, our Ultimate Goal, thou mayest be confirmed in service at His sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المقربه از الطاف حضرت مقصود امیدوارم که ترا موفق بخدمت عتبه مقدسه
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
